catch_up_note: Backdated reconstruction of the 2026-07-17 nightly assessment cycle, executed 2026-07-19. Evidence hard-capped at 2026-07-17 inclusive. Items dated 2026-07-18 or later were excluded and left deferred to the 07-18 cycle.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Operation Shaaban toll reached 91 (dedicated count) / 129 (combined) by Jul 16, but casualties are overwhelmingly armed militants in an already-priced counterinsurgency; the 42 deaths in the initiating Jul 4-8 attacks were inflicted by TTP/BLA non-state actors. No new state-caused civilian mass-harm event. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Jul 10 Kafr Rumman drone strike (1 killed) and the cumulative 4,303 killed since Mar 2 are Israeli-inflicted harm, attributed to Israel under the acting-party rule and not scored as a Lebanese own-conduct debit. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Jul 17 Israeli strike on a Gaza funeral killed at least 7 and wounded 22 (Al-Awda Hospital), with the post-ceasefire toll at 1,123 killed. Fresh dated own-conduct mass-casualty event reinforces the 0.0 floor; arithmetic forecloses any lower move. FLOOR-CONFIRMED.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Ebola reached 2,124 confirmed cases / 828 deaths as of Jul 16 (ECDC/WHO), the fastest-growing outbreak on record. Disease-attributed caseload, not a discrete new own-conduct failure; near-floor arithmetic forecloses movement. CONFIRM 2.3.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: US strikes on six bridges near Bandar Abbas overnight Jul 16-17 killed 8 and injured 20. Attribution discipline applied: logged against the United States as acting party, NOT scored as an Iran own-conduct debit. Iran's own record (784+ executions YTD) already prices the near-floor. CONFIRM 2.5.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: UN monitors recorded ~170 civilian casualties per day in Ukraine in early July; the Security Council was told Russian attacks show a 'clear' pattern of targeting civilians. Jul 15 Sumy strike is the latest dated incident. Own-conduct harm reinforces the 0.0 floor. FLOOR-CONFIRMED.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Kyiv strikes killed at least 14 (Jul 6) with a separate UN-documented incident killing 22 including 4 children. All harm is Russian-inflicted and attributed to Russia; narrowing Donetsk humanitarian access is a consequence of Russian operations, not a Ukrainian access-denial decision. CONFIRM 50.0.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: El Obeid siege continues; OHCHR documented 15 drone strikes killing 45+ civilians (Jun 6-28). MATERIAL REFINEMENT: OHCHR attributes Kordofan drone strikes to BOTH the Sudanese Armed Forces and the RSF, so a share of documented harm is state own-conduct, not solely non-state. Strengthens the own-conduct basis for the floor. FLOOR-CONFIRMED.

results.name: Cuba
results.key_finding: Jul 14 grid collapse (10M without power, third in under 10 days) is driven proximately by the US oil blockade and logged against the US; the 1,306 political-prisoner record was already logged Jul 9. With weaknessFactor already 0, a 5pt move would need ~1.6 raw dimension points. CONFIRM 32.8 + downward watch.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: DOUBLE-COUNT GUARD: the famine trajectory (36.2M food insecure, Borno Phase 5) was priced into the 2026-06-19 downgrade to 18.0. The July WFP nutrition scale-down is donor-funding-driven and substantially external; Boko Haram's farming ban is non-state conduct. No new own-conduct failure. CONFIRM 18.0.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Ethnic Unity Law (in force Jul 1) continues to draw concern and regional implementation measures, but no newly dated PRC enforcement action surfaced in-window. ACC 1.0 and INT 1.0 are already at absolute floor for those dimensions. CONFIRM 19.5, watch pending first documented enforcement.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Earthquake toll (3,800+ dead as of Jul 9) is disaster-attributed caseload with no newer official count in-window; no dated aid-diversion or responder-denial evidence. Sub-threshold math note: canonical reconstruction yields 18.4 vs published 18.0 (0.40pt), BELOW the 0.5 flag threshold — not a math-hygiene issue. CONFIRM 18.0.

results.name: Tunisia
results.key_finding: DOUBLE-COUNT GUARD: the Jul 15 appeal by 400+ former heads of state is international-response commentary on the same Ghannouchi 'Conspiracy 2' conviction already priced into the 34.4->23.8 downgrade applied 2026-07-14. No new Tunisian enforcement action. Second consecutive post-apply confirmation. CONFIRM 23.8.

results.name: Afghanistan
results.key_finding: DATE CORRECTION: the ICC arrest warrants for Akhundzada and Haqqani were issued 2025-07-08, NOT July 2026 as the scanner implied. The Jul 17 Global Justice Day statement is advocacy referencing that 2025 action. Combined with the screened 'Jul 27' Bamiyan item and the out-of-window Jul 18 HRW report, no verified new in-window own-conduct evidence exists. FLOOR-CONFIRMED at 0.0.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: No conversion trigger met (no second undisclosed-telemetry episode, no neutral regulator/court deceptive-practice finding). Trademark suits vs Abnormal AI and in India are commercial and out of compassion scope; the Jul 1 export-ban lift after added safeguards is mildly positive but not upgrade-supporting. Boundary watch sustained 0.9pt below the Established threshold. CONFIRM 59.1.

math_hygiene_notes: All 15 published composites reconstruct exactly via computeCompositeFromDimensions except Venezuela (18.4 reconstructed vs 18.0 published, 0.40pt). This is below the 0.5pt flag threshold and is NOT a math-hygiene issue; recorded for opportunistic resolution at the next dimension-changing update.

corrections_to_scanner.correction: Scanner summary implied ICC arrest warrants for Taliban leaders were 'reported this month' (July 2026). Verified against the ICC primary source: warrants were issued 2025-07-08. The Jul 17 Global Justice Day call references a year-old judicial action, not a new in-window event.

Prior-cycle framing characterised El Obeid drone harm as RSF non-state-actor conduct. OHCHR primary reporting states drones were launched BY BOTH SIDES (Sudanese Armed Forces and RSF), so a share is state own-conduct. This strengthens the own-conduct basis for the 0.0 floor.

Scanner cited a Guterres statement calling attacks on civilian infrastructure 'unacceptable.' This quote could not be independently verified within the window and is NOT cited as verbatim evidence in the assessment. Verified reporting (NBC/NPR/CNN) confirms the strikes, casualties and legal-scholar war-crime concerns instead.

deferred_to_07_18: Iran: Jul 18 Al Jazeera report citing cumulative 50+ killed / 500+ injured this month and an Iranian claim the US-Iran MoU is 'suspended'.
